# Generated by ollama (codegemma)
# Prompt: Write Linkerd Server and ServerAuthorization resources for microservices. Define which services can communicate with each other. Configure port-based and service account-based authorization rules. This is for our zero-trust service mesh.
# Category: linkerd_authz_missing

apiVersion: linkerd.io/v1alpha2
kind: ServiceProfile
metadata:
  name: service1
spec:
  traffic:
    - target: service2
      port: 80
---
apiVersion: linkerd.io/v1alpha2
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: service1
spec:
  port: 80
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: service1
---
apiVersion: linkerd.io/v1alpha2
kind: ServiceProfile
metadata:
  name: service2
spec:
  traffic:
    - target: service1
      port: 80
---
apiVersion: linkerd.io/v1alpha2
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: service2
spec:
  port: 80
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: service2
---
apiVersion: linkerd.io/v1alpha2
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: service1
spec:
  server: service1
  destinations:
    - namespace: default
      selector:
        matchLabels:
          app: service2
---
apiVersion: linkerd.io/v1alpha2
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: service2
spec:
  server: service2
  destinations:
    - namespace: default
      selector:
        matchLabels:
          app: service1
